prompt: Create a realistic, front-facing waist-up portrait photo of a female nurse or clinician standing against a plain off-white textured wall. The subject wears burgundy V-neck medical scrubs with short sleeves, a small chest pocket on the viewer's right, and a metal snap detail near the collar. A detailed stethoscope hangs naturally around the neck, with black tubing, silver metal binaurals, gray eartips resting near the pocket, and the round chest piece visible on the viewer's left side. The person has medium brown hair tied back with a few loose strands near the ears, neutral upright posture, shoulders squared, centered composition, cropped from just above the head to mid-torso. The face is intentionally covered by a large square skin-tone privacy mosaic block, hiding all facial features while leaving the hair, ears, neck, clothing, and stethoscope visible. Use soft even indoor lighting, sharp photographic detail, natural colors, minimal background distractions, and a clean clinical profile-photo style.
